description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CTest (Windows) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should use a matrix strategy to build on different Windows environments (windows-2019, windows-2022) with various build types (x64-Debug, x64-Release, etc.) and architectures (amd64, amd64_x86, amd64_arm64). For each job, check out the repository, clone a test repository, install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, configure and build with CMake, and clean up.
